description:
As a receptionist
  I want to search for OPD patients by name or ID
  So that I can quickly find their records

steps.name: Given the user is logged into the Smart Hospital portal as a receptionist

steps.name: And the user is on the "OPD - Out Patient" page
When the user types "OPD101" into the OPD search box
Then the patient table should display "The single record for Patient ID "OPD101""

parameters.name: ExpectedResult
parameters.value: The single record for Patient ID "OPD101"
